scenarios.name: local-2-1-crucible-rigor-exact-dist
scenarios.notes: Required 3.0.5 compatibility gate for Planet Crucible and Rigor Module using the exact MIR candidate archive.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-space-age-planet-cluster
scenarios.notes: Locally available Factorio 2.1 Space Age planet cluster. Missing asset/library dependencies are reported as dependency-resolution failures until the local library is filled.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-aai-loaders
scenarios.notes: Independent AAI Loaders archive gate. This is a load claim; structural loader behavior remains fixture-gated separately.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-aai-industry
scenarios.notes: Independent AAI Industry archive gate without opportunistic optional roots.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-aai-loaders-industry
scenarios.notes: Independent combined AAI Industry and AAI Loaders archive gate.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-aai-representative-extensions
scenarios.notes: Representative AAI transport and placeable-machine extension gate without using a mega-smash as ecosystem proof.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-space-age-mega-smash
scenarios.notes: Deliberately aggressive Space Age smash test from locally collected 2.1 archives. It is expected to expose incompatibilities or missing dependency zips; grouped reports decide what is MIR-relevant.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-space-age-mega-smash-with-resource-overhauls
scenarios.notes: Aggressive recipe/resource ownership stress scenario. Some listed mods may intentionally conflict with Space Age and should be classified rather than hand-waived.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-bz-suite-space-age
scenarios.notes: Locally available BZ resource suite against the official Space Age bundle.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-krastorio-spaced-out
scenarios.notes: Local Krastorio 2 Spaced Out stack. The local library must include Krastorio2 assets and any required companion dependencies for this to load.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-krastorio-base
scenarios.notes: Local Krastorio 2 base stack without Space Age.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-bob-suite
scenarios.notes: Local Bob 3.0 suite. Requires boblibrary in the local library or online resolution.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-planet-pack-wrapper-full
scenarios.notes: Local planet-pack wrapper. Recommended dependencies are included by the extended LocalLibraryScenarios tier.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-planet-pack-wrapper-lite
scenarios.notes: Local lite planet-pack wrapper. Recommended dependencies are included by the extended LocalLibraryScenarios tier.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-factorioplus-space-age
scenarios.notes: Large locally available content overhaul against the official Space Age bundle.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-ev-refining-space-age
scenarios.notes: Local refining/content scenario with Space Age enabled.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-mineral-chemistry-space-age
scenarios.notes: Local mineral chemistry scenario for recipe and productivity ownership checks.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-simple-seablock-space-age
scenarios.notes: Local SimpleSeablock scenario with Space Age enabled.

scenarios.name: local-2-1-xander-base
scenarios.notes: Local Xander scenario without Space Age because the mod declares a Space Age incompatibility.
